title: SubTopicDetail health fields
description: Optional RAG health metadata for a single todo detail under a subtopic. Matches SubTopicDetail in src/types.ts and columns on project_sub_topic_details.

health.description: Task health RAG; null means explicitly unset / not reviewed.

health_note.description: DB / API snake_case alias for healthNote.

healthNote.description: TypeScript / YAML camelCase; free-text note from last health review.

health_reviewed_at.description: DB snake_case; ISO-8601 timestamp of last health review.
